scenario: Repeat charging notifications appear when wearing one earbud and placing the other in an open, unplugged case
description_clean: When wearing one earbud and placing the other in the case (case unplugged and left open), repeat charging notifications appear. Expected behavior is only one charging notification since only one earbud is charging.
steps: Place the other earbud in the case (case unplugged and left open).
expected: Only one charging notification appears, since only one earbud is charging.
